questions.question:
A Deployment named `lifecycle-api` in namespace `lifecycle-lab` does not use the intended graceful termination behavior.

Update the Deployment so that:
- `terminationGracePeriodSeconds` is `30`
- the `preStop` hook is an exec command that runs `sleep 5`
- the container image remains `busybox:1.36`
- the main container command remains a long-running sleep loop
- the Deployment rolls out successfully
- save the output of `kubectl rollout status deployment/lifecycle-api -n lifecycle-lab` to `/tmp/exam/q4901/lifecycle-rollout-status.txt`

Do not delete Pods manually and do not force-delete the workload.

verification.description: Deployment lifecycle-api keeps the intended graceful termination spec
The rollout-status output is saved to the expected file
Deployment lifecycle-api becomes Available on the updated Pod template
